zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin II DE CREQUY於大約1140年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基時，他的父親Raoul III de Créquy21歲，母親Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers22歲。他於1160年4月24日與Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾-素-拉-利斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1226年在法國皮卡迪奧易盧瑟洛易享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin II DE CREQUY于大约1140年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基时，他的父亲Raoul III de Créquy21岁，母亲Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers22岁。他于1160年4月24日与Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾-素-拉-利斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1226年在法国皮卡迪奧易盧瑟洛易享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CREQUY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin II DE CREQUY was born about 1140, in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Raoul III de Créquy, was 21 and his mother, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, was 22. He married Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE on 24 April 1160, in Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1226, in Rousseloy, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin II DE CREQUY est né environ 1140, à Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Raoul III de Créquy, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE le 24 avril 1160, à Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1226, à Rousseloy, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin II DE CREQUY um 1140 in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul III de Créquy 21 und seine Mutter Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers 22. Er hat am 24. April 1160 in Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1226 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Rousseloy, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin II DE CREQUY è nato il circa 1140 nel Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul III de Créquy, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE il 24 aprile 1160, nel Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1226, nel Rousseloy, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin II DE CREQUYが約1140年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeクイで生まれた時，父Raoul III de Créquyは21歳，母Mahaut dite de Poméranie Neversは22歳であった。1160年4月24日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスエイアーエ-スル-ラ-リスでClémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1226年にフランスピカーディオイゼロウセロイで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin II DE CREQUY(이)가 대략 1140년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 크e크이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul III de Créquy(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1160년 4월 24일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 어-수-라-리스에서 Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1226년 프랑스 피카디 이스 루셀이에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin II DE CREQUY nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Raoul III de Créquy, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE em 24 de abril de 1160, em Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1226, em Rousseloy, Oise, Picardie, França, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin II DE CREQUY родился около 1140 г. в местности крeкуи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul III de Créquy было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE 24 апреля 1160 г. в местности эире-сур-ла-лиз, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1226 г. в местности русселои, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin II DE CREQUY nació aproximadamente 1140, en Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Raoul III de Créquy, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mahaut dite de Poméranie Nevers, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE el 24 de abril de 1160, en Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1226, en Rousseloy, Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 87 años.
